title: PostgreSQL Integration, Loopback HTTP, Fault Injection, and Reconciliation · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in disposable end-to-end ingestion harness and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Start an isolated compatible PostgreSQL 18 database, apply real migrations, seed original data, isolate tests, and prove teardown.
Use httptest origins and custom transports for validators, redirects, DNS decisions, compression, slow bodies, malformed bytes, disconnects, and publisher budgets.
Inject constraint, serialization, deadlock, lock wait, pool exhaustion, cancellation, connection loss, and commit ambiguity with expected recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Disposable Postgres
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 8539 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove disposable PostgreSQL, controlled origins, process behavior, injected faults, and end-to-end reconciliation; browser Go must remain deterministic and free of network, database, process, and host effects; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Start an isolated compatible PostgreSQL 18 database, apply real migrations, seed original data, isolate tests, and prove teardown.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Feed Go E2e Reconciliation structural check is only one gate. disposable end-to-end ingestion harness must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
